name: Tucker
description: Meet Tucker! Tucker is a sweet and loyal boy who came to us in search of his furever home. He is gentle, loves walks, and is ready to be your best friend!

name: Mater
description: Meet Mater! This lovable guy is full of personality and charm. He enjoys playtime, belly rubs, and being the center of attention. Mater is looking for a family who will give him all the love he deserves!

name: Charlotte
description: Meet Charlotte! Charlotte is a beautiful girl with a heart of gold. She loves exploring outdoors and snuggling up on the couch. She would do best in a calm, loving home.

name: Robin
description: Meet Robin! This young and spirited girl is ready for adventure! Robin loves to play, explore, and learn new things. She's looking for an active family to grow up with.

name: Porkchop
description: Meet Porkchop! Don't let the name fool you — this guy is all heart. Porkchop is a goofy, lovable companion who will make you laugh every day. He's great with people and loves attention.

name: Everglade
description: Meet Everglade! This adorable puppy is full of curiosity and love. She's learning her manners and is eager to please. Everglade would thrive with a patient family ready to raise a wonderful pup!

name: Yosemite
description: Meet Yosemite! This adventurous little pup is named after the great outdoors and lives up to it. He loves to explore and play. Yosemite is looking for an active home where he can grow and thrive!

name: Yellowstone
description: Meet Yellowstone! This handsome pup is sweet, curious, and full of potential. He's ready to find his forever family and bring joy to your home every single day.

name: Kylo
description: Meet Kylo! Kylo is a handsome guy who came to us in search of his furever home! He is a super playful, energetic guy who really enjoys his time outside in the yard, exploring. Kylo walks pretty well on a leash, but can pull at times. This guy is an 'in your pocket' type dog, and loves leaning into your legs for butt scratches. He is good with other dogs, and has lived with cats before. Kylo needs to go to a home without young children.

name: Dozer
description: Meet Dozer! This big softie loves nothing more than a good nap and some quality cuddle time. Despite his size, Dozer is gentle and calm. He's perfect for someone looking for a laid-back companion.

name: Libby
description: Meet Libby! This sweet senior girl has so much love left to give. Libby is calm, well-mannered, and enjoys peaceful walks and cozy naps. She deserves a loving home for her golden years.

name: Charm
description: Meet Charm! True to her name, this girl is absolutely charming. She's friendly, social, and loves meeting new people. Charm is ready to steal your heart!

name: TaTonka
description: Meet TaTonka! This strong and handsome boy is looking for an experienced owner who can help him be his best self. TaTonka is loyal and protective, and bonds deeply with his people.

name: Lady
description: Meet Lady! A true lady in every sense — she's graceful, calm, and loves gentle affection. Lady is looking for a quiet home where she can be the princess she was born to be.

name: Mizuki
description: Meet Mizuki! This beautiful girl is smart, attentive, and eager to please. She picks up on training quickly and loves having a job to do. Mizuki would thrive with an active family.

name: Reba McEntire
description: Meet Reba McEntire! This country queen has a voice to match — she'll let you know when she's happy! Reba is friendly, outgoing, and loves to be the star of the show.

name: Willie Nelson
description: Meet Willie Nelson! This laid-back legend is all about the good vibes. Willie is a senior gentleman who loves slow walks, sunny spots, and head scratches. He's ready to ride off into the sunset with you.

name: Snoop Dawg
description: Meet Snoop Dawg! Cool, calm, and collected — Snoop is the chillest dog in the shelter. He loves lounging around and getting belly rubs. This smooth operator is looking for his forever home.

name: Axel
description: Meet Axel! This handsome boy is full of energy and ready for action. Axel loves fetch, running, and outdoor adventures. He needs an active home that can keep up with his zest for life!

name: Marvin
description: Meet Marvin! This sweet soul is a gentle giant who loves nothing more than being close to his people. Marvin is calm, patient, and incredibly loving. He'll be your shadow and your best friend.

name: Timber
description: Meet Timber! This handsome boy is as solid as his name suggests. Timber is confident, curious, and loves to explore his surroundings. He enjoys interactive play and will reward you with loud purrs.

name: Luna & Rose
description: Meet Luna & Rose! These bonded sisters are looking for a home together. They love playing with each other, cuddling up for naps, and sharing sunny windowsills. Double the love, double the purrs!

name: Smithers
description: Meet Smithers! This distinguished gentleman is the perfect lap cat. Smithers loves quiet evenings, gentle pets, and being the center of your world. He's looking for a calm, loving home.

name: Ringo
description: Meet Ringo! This rockstar cat has personality for days. Ringo is playful, social, and loves to entertain. He'll keep you laughing with his antics and warm your heart with his cuddles.

name: Rory
description: Meet Rory! This sweet boy is looking for his forever home where he can relax and be loved. Rory enjoys gentle play and quiet companionship. He'd make a wonderful addition to any family.

name: Rusty
description: Meet Rusty! This handsome ginger boy is full of warmth — inside and out. Rusty loves to be petted, enjoys playing with toys, and will greet you at the door every day.

name: Snowball
description: Meet Snowball! This beautiful white kitty is as pure as her name. Snowball is gentle, graceful, and loves lounging in sunny spots. She's looking for a peaceful home to call her own.

name: Bobby
description: Meet Bobby! This cool cat is laid-back and easy-going. Bobby gets along well with other cats and enjoys a good chin scratch. He's ready for a forever home where he can just be himself.

name: Shaggy
description: Meet Shaggy! This fluffy boy is a total sweetheart. Shaggy gets along well with Fred and they would love to go home together, but Shaggy would also do well on his own. He loves being brushed and will purr up a storm!

name: Fred
description: Meet Fred! This dashing gentleman came to us to find his furever home! Fred gets along well with Shaggy and they would love to go home together, but Fred would also do well on his own or with another friendly cat in the home. Fred has lots of interest in toys and also people, he just wants to be around you whether that's playing or giving him pets and scritches. Fred will wiggle his way into your heart if you give him the chance!

name: Ribbon
description: Meet Ribbon! This playful young lady is full of energy and curiosity. Ribbon loves chasing toys, climbing, and discovering new hiding spots. She'll bring endless entertainment to your home!

name: Glottis
description: Meet Glottis! This unique boy has a personality as memorable as his name. Glottis is independent but affectionate on his own terms. He loves a good window perch and watching the world go by.

name: Skiddles
description: Meet Skiddles! This zippy little girl is always on the move. Skiddles loves to play, run, and pounce on anything that moves. She's looking for a home where she can burn off all that kitten energy!

name: Jetta
description: Meet Jetta! This sleek and stylish girl is as fast as her name suggests. Jetta is playful and loves interactive toys. She's looking for a home where she can show off her moves.

name: Aspen
description: Meet Aspen! This beautiful girl is calm, collected, and loves a good cuddle session. Aspen enjoys quiet evenings and will curl up right beside you. She's the perfect cozy companion.

name: Missy
description: Meet Missy! Don't let the name fool you — this girl is nothing but love. Missy is sweet, gentle, and enjoys being held. She's looking for a forever home where she can be cherished.

name: John & Arthur
description: Meet John & Arthur! These two besties are looking for a home together. They love wrestling, grooming each other, and sharing their food bowl. Adopting them is getting two best friends in one!

name: Rainbow Dash
description: Meet Rainbow Dash! This colorful character is as vibrant as her name. Rainbow Dash is energetic, playful, and loves to zoom around the room. She's looking for a fun-loving home!

name: Rosalina
description: Meet Rosalina! This regal lady is as elegant as a princess. Rosalina enjoys being admired, gentle pets, and lounging in style. She's looking for a home fit for royalty.

name: Mike
description: Meet Mike! This all-around great guy is friendly, easygoing, and gets along with everyone. Mike loves chin scratches, sunny naps, and being part of the family. He's ready for his forever home!

name: Joan
description: Meet Joan! Joan is a beautiful yellow canary searching for their furever home! This little songbird will fill your home with beautiful melodies. If you would like to meet Joan, please send in an application!
